name: Flying_wingbeat
notes: Flying via the WINGBEAT FREQUENCY signature: band power at 12-24 Hz. A beating wing emits energy near 20 Hz whether it is bright or dim, and a still tube emits essentially none, so ~120 (px/s)^2/Hz cleanly splits the no-fly replicate (tops out ~60) from every flyer including the backlit one (>=185). The absolute level still scales with contrast -- retune the line on the plot for new footage -- but the SEPARATION from non-flying is large. Use this alongside 'Flying' (relative speed): band power keys on periodicity, relative speed on amplitude-vs-background; they agree on the clear cases and disagree on the marginal ones, which is exactly where to look.
